issue: After PR2 dropped tanstack-query-router-patterns (no @tanstack dep in this fixture), task tokens for both tasks find zero rule-id hits, so the task router falls back to all medium/high-confidence rules (7 entries including baselines). Previously narrow-collapsed to one rule; now over-selects.
expected: Task tokens should route to ecosystem base rules (nextjs-patterns + react19-patterns + typescript6-patterns) without dragging baselines and package-manager into every implementation task.
rootCauseHypothesis: src/commands/context.ts pickTaskRelevantRules falls back to mediumOrHigh when no token matches. Needs an ecosystem-aware routing table that maps task keywords to rule groups and respects which rules are scaffolding (playwright) vs implementation (nextjs/react/ts).
resolvedByTest: tests/cross-bleed.test.js (nextjs-app / build dashboard route rejects testing rules + no baselines)
